findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "compliance_scan_gdpr" references sensitive artifacts (cookie). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Use this when you need to check a website's GDPR compliance. Scans the URL plus /privacy-policy and /cookie-policy pages. Returns a compliance report in JSON. R…
